title: Hello World on Stellar
description: Install StarForge, create a funded test wallet, and prepare your first Soroban deploy.

steps.title: Verify your environment
steps.description: Confirm StarForge, network connectivity, and optional Stellar CLI availability.

steps.title: Create a deployer wallet
steps.description: Generate a testnet keypair and fund it via Friendbot when available.

steps.title: Inspect saved wallets
steps.description: Confirm the deployer wallet is stored locally and listed correctly.

steps.title: Build your contract
steps.description: Compile Soroban WASM with the Stellar CLI in your project directory.

steps.title: Prepare deployment
steps.description: Validate WASM size, wallet balance, and print the exact deploy command.
